input: Biology is the natural science that studies life and living organisms, including their physical structure, chemical processes, molecular interactions, physiological mechanisms, development and evolution. On the most fundamental level, all organisms consist of basic elements (mutually interdependent molecules of biological polymers) that are able to form complex components and then, in turn, durable and evolutionary stable structures. The study of the structure and function of cells is the main focus of molecular biology. The study of the properties of tissues, organs and organ systems is called physiology.

input:
Ingredients
- 2 cups of cooked lentils
- 1 tablespoon of olive oil
- ½ teaspoon of chili pepper flakes
- 1 onion, minced
- 2 garlic cloves, minced

Instructions
1. Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chili pepper flakes, onion, and garlic. Cook for 5 minutes.
3. Add the cooked lentils and cook for 5 minutes longer.

The Benefits of Working From Home

Working from home is quickly becoming the preferred option for many professionals for a wide range of reasons. For starters, not having to commute to a central office means more time for yourself, saving money as you don’t have to buy food, outfits, and transportation to go to work. It’s also a great way to stay home with your kids but still maintain your professional career, as well as the added convenience of the numerous digital platforms that allow for remote working.

Generate 5 different alternative summaries for the given text.
input: Biomass is organic material that comes from living or recently living organisms. It can be derived from both land-based and aquatic biomass. Common sources of biomass are plants and their byproducts, energy crops, waste from agriculture and forestry, and byproducts from food processing sectors. Biomass can be used for energy in the form of solid, liquid, or gaseous fuels. It can also be used to produce bioplastics, biochemicals, and biofuels. Biomass is an important source of renewable energy and a major contributor to the fight against climate change.
